data.biography: Min Sung Wook is an actor with many supporting cast under his belt. He is under J-Wide Company. He graduated from Yong In University - Dept. of Theater and Film. His popular dramas are Pinocchio, I Remember You and Six Flying Dragons.
data.name: Min Sung-wook

data.biography: 闵成旭，韩文：민성욱，男，韩国演员，代表作品《Three Days》《匹诺曹》等。2015KBS《记得你》饰演孙明宇。2014SBS《匹诺曹》饰记者张找茬。2014SBS《Three Days》饰演特检组律师。2013KBS2《总理和我》饰演记者卞雨哲。
data.name: 闵成旭

data.biography: C'est un acteur connu pour Six Flying Dragons (2015), Circle (2017) et While You Were Sleeping (2017). IMDB
data.name: Min Sung-wook

data.biography: 閔成旭，韓文：민성욱，男，韓國演員，代表作品《Three Days》《匹諾曹》等。2015KBS《記得你》飾演孫明宇。2014SBS《匹諾曹》飾記者張找茬。2014SBS《Three Days》飾演特檢組律師。2013KBS2《總理和我》飾演記者卞雨哲。
data.name: 閔成旭
